name: Medical Licensing Exam Workflow Setup
description: You are the IT specialist for the National Board of Medical Examiners at a regional testing center. The center is preparing to administer a new cycle of USMLE Step 1 assessments integrated with SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, super-admin / admin). Import a quiz from the Assessment Tool and configure the exam instance with two monitoring indicators: a 'Last Ping Time' indicator named 'Latency Monitor' (warning threshold 4000, danger threshold 10000) and a 'Warning-Log Counter' indicator named 'Integrity Alert' (warning threshold 2, danger threshold 5). These indicators must be added directly to the exam instance rather than a template. Create and activate a dedicated exam proctor account for David Kim (username: 'med.proctor', email: 'd.kim@nbme.gov') with the Exam Supporter role.
